---
title: "Regional EEZ MHW"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 5
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* Style section wrappers generated by Quarto as standalone cards */
main .level2 {
  background-color: #fff;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
  transition: transform 0.2s ease;
}

main .level2:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.icon {
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  max-width: 900px;
}

.icon-tiny {
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  max-width: 300px;
}
</style>
```


## West Coast

::: {.icon}
![Top graph shows the total % of the US west coast EEZ (not including waters off of Alaska) that is classified as in "heatwave" status over the past 6 months. Left lower panel shows the region covered by the EEZ (blue dashed line) and then subregions: WA (1), OR (2), northern CA (3), central CA (4), and southern CA (5). Lower colored panel indicates the % coverage within each subregion that is in heatwave status.](images/Fig5.png)
:::

## Washington

::: {.icon-tiny}
![](images/regional/wa_map.png)
:::

[Download Washington daily data](https://oceanview.pfeg.noaa.gov/erddap/tabledap/cciea_OC_MHW_regions.graph?time%2Cheatwave_cover%2C&region=%22wa%22&.draw=lines&.marker=5%7C5&.color=0x000000&.colorBar=%7C%7C%7C%7C%7C&.bgColor=0xffccccff")

::: {.icon}
![Washhington 1-year graph](images/regional/wa all indices 1 years.png)
:::

::: {.icon}
![Washhington 10 year graph](images/regional/wa all indices 10 years.png)
:::

## Oregon

::: {.icon-tiny}
![](images/regional/or_map.png)
:::

[Download Oregon daily data](https://oceanview.pfeg.noaa.gov/erddap/tabledap/cciea_OC_MHW_regions.graph?time%2Cheatwave_cover%2C&region=%22or%22&.draw=lines&.marker=5%7C5&.color=0x000000&.colorBar=%7C%7C%7C%7C%7C&.bgColor=0xffccccff")

::: {.icon}
![Oregon 1-year graph](images/regional/or all indices 1 years.png)
:::

::: {.icon}
![Oregon 10 year graph](images/regional/or all indices 10 years.png)
:::

## Northern California

::: {.icon-tiny}
![](images/regional/norcal_map.png)
:::

[Download Northern California daily data](https://oceanview.pfeg.noaa.gov/erddap/tabledap/cciea_OC_MHW_regions.graph?time%2Cheatwave_cover%2C&region=%22norcal%22&.draw=lines&.marker=5%7C5&.color=0x000000&.colorBar=%7C%7C%7C%7C%7C&.bgColor=0xffccccff")

::: {.icon}
![Northern California 1 year graph](images/regional/norcal all indices 1 years.png)
:::

::: {.icon}
![Northern California 10 year graph](images/regional/norcal all indices 10 years.png)
:::

## Central California

::: {.icon-tiny}
![](images/regional/cencal_map.png)
:::

[Download Central Californian daily data](https://oceanview.pfeg.noaa.gov/erddap/tabledap/cciea_OC_MHW_regions.graph?time%2Cheatwave_cover%2C&region=%22cencal%22&.draw=lines&.marker=5%7C5&.color=0x000000&.colorBar=%7C%7C%7C%7C%7C&.bgColor=0xffccccff")

::: {.icon}
![Central California 1 year graph](images/regional/cencal all indices 1 years.png)
:::

::: {.icon}
![Central California 10 year graph](images/regional/cencal all indices 10 years.png)
:::

## Southern California

::: {.icon-tiny}
![](images/regional/socal_map.png){.icon-tiny}
:::

[Download Southern California daily data](https://oceanview.pfeg.noaa.gov/erddap/tabledap/cciea_OC_MHW_regions.graph?time%2Cheatwave_cover%2C&region=%22socal%22&.draw=lines&.marker=5%7C5&.color=0x000000&.colorBar=%7C%7C%7C%7C%7C&.bgColor=0xffccccff")

::: {.icon}
![Southern California 1-year graph](images/regional/socal all indices 1 years.png)
:::

::: {.icon}
![Southern California 10-year graph](images/regional/socal all indices 10 years.png)
:::
